fields.name: Journal Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal template, the basis of the journal batch, that the entries were posted from.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the journal line.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item on the journal line.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date for the entry.

fields.name: Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of transaction that will be posted from the item journal line.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number for the journal line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the item on the journal line.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the inventory location where the item on the journal line will be registered.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of the item to be included on the journal line.

fields.name: Unit Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the item on the journal line.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line's net amount.

fields.name: Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount amount of this entry on the line.

fields.name: Salespers./Purch. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the salesperson or purchaser who is linked to the sale or purchase on the journal line.

fields.name: Applies-to Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the quantity on the journal line must be applied to an already-posted entry. In that case, enter the entry number that the quantity will be applied to.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Indirect Cost %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage of the item's last purchase cost that includes indirect costs, such as freight that is associated with the purchase of the item.

fields.name: Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the journal batch, a personalized journal layout, that the entries were posted from.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Recurring Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies a recurring method, if you have indicated that the journal is recurring.

fields.name: Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expiration date, if any, of the item carrying the item tracking number.

fields.name: Recurring Frequency
fields.tooltip: Specifies a recurring frequency if it is indicated that the journal is recurring.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of transaction that the document represents, for the purpose of reporting to INTRASTAT.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the transport method, for the purpose of reporting to INTRASTAT.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: New Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the new location to link the items on this journal line.

fields.name: New Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the new dimension value code that will link to the items on the journal line.

fields.name: New Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the new dimension value code that will link to the items on the journal line.

fields.name: Qty. (Calculated)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity on hand of the item.

fields.name: Qty. (Phys. Inventory)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity on hand of the item as determined from a physical count.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's or customer's trade type to link transactions made for this business partner with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the order that created the entry.

fields.name: Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the order that created the entry.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a bin code for the item.

fields.name: New Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the new bin code to link to the items on this journal line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Reserved Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item reserved for the line.

fields.name: Flushing Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies how consumption of the item (component) is calculated and handled in production processes. Manual: Enter and post consumption in the consumption journal manually. Forward: Automatically posts consumption according to the production order component lines when the first operation starts. Backward: Automatically calculates and posts consumption according to the production order component lines when the production order is finished. Pick + Forward / Pick + Backward: Variations with warehousing.

fields.name: Item Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reference to the item number as defined by the item's barcode.

fields.name: Inventory Value (Calculated)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the calculated inventory value of the item at the specified posting date.

fields.name: Inventory Value (Revalued)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the new inventory value.

fields.name: Applies-from Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the outbound item ledger entry, whose cost is forwarded to the inbound item ledger entry.

fields.name: Unit Cost (Calculated)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the current unit cost of this item before revaluation.

fields.name: Unit Cost (Revalued)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the revalued unit cost of this item.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the journal type, which is either Work Center or Machine Center.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Cap. Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure code for the capacity usage.

fields.name: Qty. per Cap. Unit of Measure
Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number of the item.

fields.name: Lot No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lot number of the item.

fields.name: Warranty Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the warranty expiration date of the item.

fields.name: Package No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the package number of the item.

fields.name: Price Calculation Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the method that will be used for price calculation in the item journal line.
